azcam
  • »
  • Utility Commands
Next Previous

Utility Commands¶

The azcam.utils module contains general purpose python functions used throughout azcam.

These commands are not available remotely (i.e. over a socket connection).

General support commands for throughout azcam code.

add_searchfolder(search_folder='', include_subfolders=True)¶

Appends search_folder (and by default all its subfolders) to the current python search path. Default is current folder and its subfolders.

Parameters

  • search_folder – Name of folder to add to sys.path

  • include_subfolders – True to include all subfolders in sys.path

Returns

None

archive(foldername='', filetype='tar')¶

Make a tarfile from a folder or file. Type can be “tar”, “tar.gz”, or “zip”. Return tarfile filename.

check_keyboard(Wait=False)¶

Checks user’s keyboard for a key press.

Parameters

Wait (bool) – True to wait until a key is pressed

Return str

Key which was pressed or empty string none.

checksum(filename)¶

Make a checksum file in the working folder. Return filename and checksum value.

cleanup_files(folder=None)¶

Cleanup folders after data analysis.

count_files(path='')¶

Return the number of files in path (default is current folder). Folders are not included.

curdir(folder='')¶

Gets and sets the working folder. If folder==’’, return the current working folder.

Parameters

folder (str) – Name of folder

Returns

None

file_browser(Path='', SelectString='*.*', Label='')¶

Filebrowser GUI to select files. This is the tcl/tk version.

Parameters

  • Path (str) – Starting path for selection

  • SelectString (str) – Selection string like [(‘all files’,(‘.’))] for filtering file names or folder to select folders

  • Label (str) – Dialog box label

Return list

List of selected files/folders or None

find_file(filename, include_curdir=False)¶

Find the absolute filename for a file in the current search path. Set include_curdir True to add curdir() to search path. Raises FileNotFoundError if file not found.

Parameters

  • filename (str) – Name of file

  • include_curdir (bool) – True to include current folder in sys.path

Returns

Cleaned path name

find_file_in_sequence(FileRoot, FileNumber=1)¶

Returns the Nth file in an image sequence where N is FileNumber (-1 for first file). FileRoot is the the image file root name. Returns (filename,sequencenumber).

find_plugins()¶

Find all azcam plugins.

fix_path(Path='', no_drive_letter=1)¶

Makes a nice absolute path, hopefully leaving only forward slashes.

Parameters

  • Path (str) – Name of path to cleanup

  • no_drive_letter (bool) – Removes leading drive letter

Returns

Cleaned path name

get_attr(object_name, attribute)¶

Get the value of an object’s attribute. Advanced Use only!

get_datatype(value)¶

Determine the data type for an object and set the type if possible. A string such as “1.23” will result in a type “float” and “2” will result in type “int”.

Parameters

value – object to be typed

Return [type, value]

list of data type as a code and object with that type

Return type

List

get_error_status()¶

Returns and clears the global errorstatus list database parameter.

return list: [‘OK’,’’] or [‘ERROR’,’an error string’].

get_image_roi()¶

Get the data and noise regions of interest in image image coordinates. Check for ROI’s in the following order:

  • azcam.db.imageroi if defined

  • display.roi if defined

get_par(parameter)¶

Return the value of a parameter from the local azcamparameters dictionary. Returns None on error.

make_file_folder(subfolder, increment=True, use_number=False)¶

Creates a new subfolder in the current FileFolder. subfolder - subfolder name to create increment - if True, subfolder name may be incremented to create a unique name (e.g. ptc1, ptc2, ptc3…) use_number - if True, starts with ‘1’ after Subfolder name (e.g. report1 not report) Returns [currentfolder,newfolder, with newfolder=’ERROR’ if a failure occurs.

make_image_filename(imagefile)¶

Returns the absolute file imagefile, with forward slashes. Appends “.fits” if no extension is included.

Parameters

imagefile (str) – Image filename to be expanded

Return str

Expanded image filename

parse(String, SetType=0)¶

Parse a string into tokens using the standard azcam rules. If setType is true, try and set data data type for each token.

Parameters

  • String (str) – String to be parsed into tokens

  • SetType (bool) – True to try and set type of each token

Return lsit

list of parsed tokens

prompt(PromptMessage='Enter a string', Default='')¶

Prints a message and waits for user input.

Parameters

  • PromptMessage (str) – String to be printed

  • Default (str) – String to be returned if no value is entered

Return str

String entered or Default

run_script(script_name)¶

Runs a script, either with absolute path or assumes it is in the search path. This method is exposed as the Run command when using IPython.

Parameters

script_name (str) – filename of script to run

Return None

set_error_status(ErrorFlag='OK', Message='')¶

Sets the global errorstatus list database parameter.

Parameters

  • ErrorFlag (list) – value to set global errorstatus flag. “OK” by default.

  • Message (str) – value to set global error status message. Empty by default.

set_image_roi(roi=[])¶

Set the image region of interest. If roi is not specified, use display ROI.

Parameters

roi (list) – ROI list or []

Return None

set_par(parameter, value=None)¶

Set the value of a parameter in the local azcamparameters dictionary. Returns None on error.

show_menu(configs)¶

Interative: Show a menu and wait for selection. “blank” may be used to display an empty line. print() is allowed here as interactive only.

Parameters

configs (dict) – Dictionary of strings which are menu items

Return str

Number of item selected or empty.

update_pars(write, par_dict=None)¶

Update azcam parameters to/from a genpars dictionary. write True => write values into dictionary. write False => set values from dictionary.
